'''ngabudu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:featherblade|featherblade]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-b-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:featherblade|featherblade]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| ngabudu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæbidith|ngæbidith]] || [[word:ngæbidij|ngæbidij]] || [[word:ngæbidish|ngæbidish]] || [[word:ngæbidi|ngæbidi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngabubuduth|ngabubuduth]] || [[word:ngabubuduj|ngabubuduj]] || [[word:ngabubudush|ngabubudush]] || [[word:ngabubudu|ngabubudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngabuduth|ngabuduth]] || [[word:ngabuduj|ngabuduj]] || [[word:ngabudush|ngabudush]] || [[word:ngabudu|ngabudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngabufduth|ngabufduth]] || [[word:ngabufduj|ngabufduj]] || [[word:ngabufdush|ngabufdush]] || [[word:ngabufduf|ngabufduf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngabuduthu|ngabuduthu]] || [[word:ngabuduju|ngabuduju]] || [[word:ngabudushu|ngabudushu]] || [[word:ngabuduku|ngabuduku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngabuduth|ngabuduth]] || [[word:ngabuduj|ngabuduj]] || [[word:ngabudush|ngabudush]] || [[word:ngabudu|ngabudu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngabuduthul|ngabuduthul]] || [[word:ngabudujul|ngabudujul]] || [[word:ngabudushul|ngabudushul]] || [[word:ngabudukul|ngabudukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngabuduthuthu|ngabuduthuthu]] || [[word:ngabudujuju|ngabudujuju]] || [[word:ngabudushushu|ngabudushushu]] || [[word:ngabuduku|ngabuduku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngabuduthun|ngabuduthun]] || [[word:ngabudujun|ngabudujun]] || [[word:ngabudushun|ngabudushun]] || [[word:ngabudukun|ngabudukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngabuduthuoro|ngabuduthuoro]] || [[word:ngabudujuoro|ngabudujuoro]] || [[word:ngabudushuoro|ngabudushuoro]] || [[word:ngabudukuoro|ngabudukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
